title: daviesia ulicifolia subsp. ruscifolia
intro: Daviesia ulicifolia subsp. ruscifolia is a subspecies of plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the "ruscus-leaved Daviesia". This plant is traditionally used in Australian herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Daviesia ulicifolia subsp. ruscifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. The plant is often prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
